name: EUR/USD

analysis: EUR/USD is leaning down on the 4-hour, 77% conviction. The Daily bias agrees. Volatility is quiet — coiled and choppy. Nearest structure: floor (18.0 pips away). A firm dollar (+0.28% DXY) is a tailwind for the read.
watch: Downtrend intact (4H + Daily) — waiting for a pullback to the 8-EMA to go short.
